subject: fix(ui): color audit — reduce primary overuse, natural overlays, fix text colors
body:
Redistribute primary color to accent for secondary UI elements, soften
tone tag and reaction overlays with tinted backgrounds instead of solid
fills, and fix Save button text contrast in ToneEditModal.

- ALPHA badge, Install/Join buttons, avatar rings, settings toggles → accent
- Tone tags: solid bg → withAlpha(toneColor, 0.15) + border + colored text
- Own tone tags: primary tint → neutral baseContent tint
- ReactionBar: solid bg-primary → withAlpha(primary, 0.15) + border
- ToneEditModal Save: baseContent → primaryContent (contrast fix)
- ToneSelector: unreliable hex suffix → withAlpha() utility

Tags: ui, color-audit, tones, reactions, accessibility
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: color-system
Semver: patch
